data.title: 60% of prospective graduate students unaware of upcoming federal student loan changes, College Ave survey finds.
data.description: In a recent survey by College Ave, it was found that a significant number of potential graduate students see an advanced degree as essential for their professional advancement. The national study, released on February 17, 2026, highlights a lack of knowledge among these students about the upcoming opportunities in the field. The survey indicates that a large portion of prospective graduate students may not be fully informed about the options available to them. This suggests a need for better dissemination of information to help these individuals make more informed decisions about their education and careers.

data.title: Infleqtion, a quantum company using neutral-atom technology, goes public on NYSE with ticker symbol "INFQ" after merging with Churchill X.
data.description: Infleqtion, a renowned company in quantum computing and sensing utilizing neutral-atom technology, has officially been listed on the New York Stock Exchange as a publicly traded entity. Trading under the ticker symbol "INFQ," the company's merger with Churchill Capital Corp X, a special purpose acquisition firm, has been successfully concluded. The backing from Churchill X's investors was substantial, facilitating Infleqtion's debut on the NYSE.

data.title: Amerant Bank in FL appoints Tony Eelman as EVP and Chief Product Officer to lead product strategy. Byline: Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: In Coral Gables, Florida, on February 17, 2026, Amerant Bank has appointed Tony Eelman as the EVP and Chief Product Officer. With a significant presence in South Florida, Amerant Bank is known as a top choice bank in Florida. Eelman, a seasoned financial services and mortgage-banking executive, will take charge of driving product strategy for the bank’s financial services and program-based lending platforms. This move signifies Amerant Bank's commitment to enhancing their offerings under Eelman's leadership.

data.title: Sezzle and David’s Bridal host "Love in Times Square" event with Tell Me Lies cast members, promoting love and financial wellness.
data.description: A remarkable immersive event transformed Times Square with the presence of cast members from the show Tell Me Lies.

data.title: SolomonEdwards celebrates 5 years of IntelliTox™ platform; aids poison control & telehealth with advanced solutions.
data.description: SolomonEdwards, a nationwide professional services firm specializing in addressing crucial business issues for companies experiencing growth, transition, or compliance-related situations, celebrated the five-year milestone of its specialized call center management solution, IntelliTox™, catering to poison control and telehealth entities. Alongside the Poison Control Center at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia, SolomonEdwards’ Technology Innovation collaborated with Salesforc in 2020.
Russians and Belarusians allowed to compete under own flags at 2026 Paralympics: IPC

data.title: Elliott Investment Management bought 10% stake in Norwegian Cruise Line for turnaround. Shares surged.
data.description: Hedge fund Elliott Investment Management recently acquired a 10% ownership in Norwegian Cruise Line in efforts to enhance its performance. Following this development, the company's shares experienced a significant increase in value. This move by Elliott Investment Management to purchase a sizable portion of Norwegian Cruise Line underscores their intention to actively participate in the company's operations and potentially implement changes for improved results.

data.title: Royale Energy, Inc. plans to enhance shareholder value and potentially relist on Nasdaq, engaging Roth Capital Partners as financial advisor.
data.description: San Diego, Feb. 17, 2026 - Royale Energy, Inc. (OTC: ROYL) disclosed today that the Board of Directors has commenced an exhaustive Strategic Review to fortify the Company’s financial stance, improve readiness for capital markets, and prepare for a potential relisting on a national exchange, contingent upon meeting necessary listing criteria and market circumstances. To oversee this Strategic Review, Roth Capital Partners has been appointed as the financial advisor by the Company.
NASDAQ 100 EXTENDS DECLINE TO 1%

data.title: Conference Board's Employment Trends Index™ rose in January. Annual revisions moved to June 2026.
data.description: The annual revisions of standardization factors to the Employment Trends Index, originally scheduled for release in January 2026, have been postponed to June 2026. This decision was made to include the latest data from the most recent completed calendar year in the sample period.

data.title: Insurance expert Kevin Spann from Middle Village discusses the need for umbrella insurance in NYC due to high property values and legal risk.
data.description: A recent article published on February 17, 2026 in Middle Village, New York highlights the importance of liability coverage in New York City. The piece discusses how the high property values, personal assets, and legal risks in the city make umbrella insurance a crucial consideration for residents. The article questions the necessity of this additional coverage for individuals in New York City and provides insights from a HelloNation publication.

data.title: Cadiz, Inc. selected to apply for $194M WIFIA loan from EPA for Mojave Groundwater Bank – Northern Pipeline Project.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Cadiz, California, Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI / CDZIP), announced that the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency ("EPA") has chosen the Mojave Groundwater Bank – Northern Pipeline ("MGB–NPL") Project for a low-interest loan application.

data.title: Purpose Legal debuts PurposeXi™, an advanced intelligence platform, unveiling CaseOptics™ at Legalweek 2026. Built on AI innovation.
data.description: A new product called PurposeXi™ has been introduced by Purpose Legal in Dallas on February 17, 2026. This expert intelligence platform integrates the company's AI-powered services. In addition, Company has revealed PurposeXi CaseOptics™ for early case intelligence. This product will be featured at Legalweek 2026.

data.title: Bulletproof named to CRN's MSP 500 list in Security MSP 100 category for 2026, 2nd year in a row. #Boston #GLI #CRN #MSP500.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 17, 2026, Bulletproof, a subsidiary of GLI, revealed their consecutive inclusion in CRN's Managed Service Provider (MSP) 500 list for 2026. They were recognized in the Security MSP 100 category for the second year running. This annual list compiled by CRN, a division of The Channel Company, highlights leading MSPs in the industry._bulletproof has achieved this recognition, solidifying their position among the top performers in managed services, showcasing their commitment to security services._

data.title: INVL Technology updated its Articles of Association on 17 Feb 2026, approved during a meeting on 5 Feb 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, INVL Technology made changes to its Articles of Association, which were officially registered in the Register of Legal Entities. The revised Articles of Association were endorsed on February 5, 2026, at an Extraordinary General Shareholders Meeting.
